name: cs-ranger
description: CS-Ranger monolith: Next.js frontend + Node backend services, one install, one build, one start.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix frontend --no-audit --no-fund && npm install --prefix backend --no-audit --no-fund
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix backend run start" "npm --prefix frontend run start"
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix frontend run typecheck && npm --prefix backend run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend run test && npm --prefix frontend run test
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
